title: Ginger Stir-Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir-fry made with ginger and your favorite ingredients. Serve as a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the mixed greens and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the rice noodles and edamame, stir-fry for 3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with sesame seeds and chopped green onions if desired.
